basic_details.job_title: IIT Jodhpur Project Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Jodhpur (IIT Jodhpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Jodhpur (IIT Jodhpur) Project Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official IIT Jodhpur website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Jodhpur Project Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. or M.E./M.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech. or M.E./M.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jodhpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Jodhpur Project Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Jodhpur Project Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Project Research Fellow position at IIT Jodhpur is 24-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.E./B.Tech. or M.E./M.Tech. degree in Mechanical Engineering or an equivalent qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 35,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT Jodhpur Project Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official IIT Jodhpur website on or before the last date of application.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a contractual or permanent job?
faq.answer: The job is contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is available in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Research Fellow post at IIT Jodhpur.
